summary: Phase 1 Admin & Safety Features - Comprehensive testing of all 4 new feature areas: Community Password (DB-backed), Admin User Deletion, User Reporting System, and Admin-triggered Password Reset. All 20 backend tests passed. All frontend flows verified working via Playwright.

minor.issue: Email delivery fails (503) for non-martinasobku@gmail.com addresses due to Resend free-tier domain restriction. Token IS stored in DB (correct behavior). Error message shown in UI is verbose Resend error. This is EXPECTED/KNOWN and noted in mocked_api.
minor.priority: MINOR - token stored in DB, behavior correct per design

1_community_password_get.details: GET /api/admin/settings/community-password returns current password ('Transfortrans'). Requires admin auth (401 without token).

2_community_password_put.details: PUT updates password in DB. Verified: old password rejected for new registration, new password accepted. Password restored to 'Transfortrans'. Short passwords (<4 chars) rejected with 400.

3_registration_db_password.details: POST /api/auth/register checks DB password (not hardcoded). 'Transfortrans' works. Wrong password returns 400.

4_admin_settings_tab_ui.details: Settings tab (data-testid=settings-tab) shows current password (masked). Toggle visibility button works. new-community-password-input and save-community-password-btn both present and functional. Success toast 'Komunitní heslo bylo změněno!' shown on save.

5_admin_users_delete_reset_buttons.details: 24 delete (Trash2) buttons and 24 reset (RefreshCw) buttons visible in Users tab (all non-admin users). data-testid=delete-user-{id} and reset-user-{id} verified.

6_delete_user_endpoint.details: DELETE /api/admin/users/{id} removes account. Verified: deleted user cannot login (401). Admin cannot delete self (400). Non-existent user returns 404. Non-admin access rejected.

7_user_reporting.details: POST /api/users/{userId}/report creates report with reason/description. Duplicate reports prevented (400). Self-reporting prevented (400). Non-existent user returns 404.

8_admin_reports_get.details: GET /api/admin/reports returns list with reporter_name, reported_user_name, reason, status, description fields. Requires admin auth.

9_admin_reports_resolve.details: PUT /api/admin/reports/{id}/resolve marks as 'resolved'. Verified status updated in DB. 404 for non-existent report.

10_admin_reports_tab_ui.details: Reports tab (data-testid=reports-tab) shows report list. data-testid=resolve-report-{id} button present for open reports. Empty state shows 'Žádná nahlášení'. Toast 'Nahlášení vyřešeno' shown on resolve.

11_user_profile_report_dialog.details: User profile page has 'Nahlásit uživatele' button (data-testid=report-user-btn). Dialog opens with reason select (report-reason-select), description textarea (report-description-input), submit button (submit-report-btn). Report submission shows toast 'Nahlášení bylo odesláno administrátorovi'. Dialog closes after submission.

12_registration_help_text.details: Registration page has help text box with martinasobku@gmail.com link. 'Nevím komunitní heslo' button (data-testid=unknown-password-help-btn) toggles expanded help text (data-testid=password-help-text) with 3-step instructions.

13_admin_send_reset.details: POST /api/admin/users/{id}/send-reset stores token in DB (verified via backend test). Email delivery fails for non-martinasobku addresses (expected Resend free-tier behavior). UI shows error toast with Resend message. 404 for non-existent user, 401 without admin auth.

critical_code_review_comments: NOTE: admin send-reset email fails for non-martinasobku emails and the Resend error message is exposed directly to admin UI. Consider a more user-friendly error message like 'Reset link saved. Email delivery failed - use /reset-password?token=...' for non-verified domains.
NOTE: server.py is now 1597 lines - getting close to the 700-line split threshold but still manageable. Consider splitting admin routes to a separate module in future.
All data-testid attributes properly set for new UI elements. Report flow end-to-end working.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted temp users during testing (TEST_uitest_dlttest, TEST_reporter_*, TEST_temp_* - all cleaned up). One test report created and resolved in admin panel.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 Admin & Safety features all working: community password DB-backed, admin user deletion, user reporting, admin password reset (token stored, email fails for non-martinasobku per Resend free-tier). Community password is 'Transfortrans'. Admin: test1@bloom.cz / test123. Server.py is 1597 lines.

admin_send_reset_email_failure.root_cause: Resend free-tier account can only send emails to the verified address (martinasobku@gmail.com). Sending to other addresses returns 'You can only send testing emails to your own email address'.
admin_send_reset_email_failure.reproduction: Click reset button (RefreshCw) on any user in admin panel who is NOT martinasobku@gmail.com
admin_send_reset_email_failure.mitigation: Token is stored in DB regardless. Verify Resend domain or use a different email provider for production. Error is expected behavior in current environment.
